Large Banner Frame Specifications & Professional Display Features

Our large outdoor banner frames provide professional-grade display solutions for events, construction sites, and commercial installations. These lightweight yet durable aluminum frames support banners up to 100" wide with secure attachment systems.

Frame Construction & Materials

  • Heavy-duty aluminum construction resists weather and corrosion
  • Lightweight design at 15.25 lbs for easy transport and setup
  • Professional ball bungee attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Portable design with included carrying case

Display Specifications

  • Frame Size: 100.75" W x 38" H x 24.75" D
  • Compatible with grommeted banners (banner sold separately)
  • Case Dimensions: 49.25" L x 10.25" W x 4.25" H
  • Suitable for outdoor events, construction sites, and commercial displays

Professional Applications

  • Trade shows and outdoor events
  • Construction site advertising and safety displays
  • Retail storefront promotions
  • Real estate and property marketing
  • Sports events and sponsor displays

Banner Frame Materials for Outdoor Durability

Our large outdoor banner frames are constructed with premium materials designed for professional display applications and weather resistance.

Aluminum Frame Construction

  • Aircraft-grade aluminum tubing provides strength while maintaining light weight
  • Corrosion-resistant finish withstands outdoor weather conditions

Hardware Components

Compatible Banner Materials

This frame system works with any grommeted banner material including:

Banner Frame Compatible Artwork & Design Specifications

Ensure your banner displays perfectly with our large outdoor banner frame by following these artwork specifications and design guidelines.

Banner Size Requirements

  • Recommended banner size: 96" W x 36" H (allows 2" border on all sides)
  • Maximum banner size: 100" W x 38" H
  • Minimum banner size: 90" W x 30" H
  • Custom sizes available - contact for compatibility confirmation

Grommet Specifications

  • Grommets required every 12" around banner perimeter
  • Standard #2 grommets (1/2" hole) work with ball bungee system
  • Grommets should be placed 1" from banner edge
  • Minimum 8 grommets required for proper frame attachment

Design Considerations

  • Keep important text and logos 3" from all edges
  • Design for outdoor viewing distances (minimum 2" text height)
  • High contrast colors ensure visibility in various lighting
  • Consider wind load - avoid solid color areas that show wrinkles

File Format Requirements

  • PDF files preferred for professional printing
  • Minimum 150 DPI resolution for outdoor viewing quality
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Include 0.125" bleed on all sides for trimming

Banner Material Recommendations

  • 13oz vinyl: Maximum durability for long-term outdoor display
  • Mesh vinyl: High-wind areas and permanent installations
  • Fabric: Premium appearance for corporate events
  • All materials must include finished hems and grommets

Note: Banner frames are sold as hardware only. Compatible banners with proper grommets must be ordered separately or provided by customer.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What banner sizes work with this frame?

The frame accommodates banners from 90" x 30" up to 100" x 38". We recommend 96" x 36" banners for optimal display with proper border spacing. All banners must include grommets for attachment.

Is the banner included with the frame?

No, this product includes only the aluminum frame hardware and carrying case. Banners must be ordered separately or provided by the customer with proper grommet specifications.

How much wind can this frame handle?

The frame is designed for typical outdoor conditions. For high-wind areas, we recommend using mesh banners and adding ground stakes or sandbags for stability. Avoid using in winds over 25 mph without additional anchoring.

Can one person assemble this frame?

Yes, the lightweight aluminum construction and tool-free design allow single-person assembly in about 10 minutes. The color-coded components and instruction guide make setup straightforward.

What's included in the carrying case?

The case includes all aluminum frame sections, stainless steel ball bungees, corner connectors, and setup instructions. The case dimensions are 49.25" x 10.25" x 4.25" for easy transport.

Can I use this frame indoors?

Absolutely. While designed for outdoor durability, this frame works excellently for indoor trade shows, presentations, and retail displays. The professional appearance is suitable for any commercial environment.

How do I attach banners without grommets?

Grommets are required for proper attachment to our ball bungee system. If your banner doesn't have grommets, a local print shop can add them, or we can produce a compatible banner for your frame.

What ground anchoring do you recommend?

For outdoor installations, we recommend ground stakes through the frame base or sandbags at each corner. The specific anchoring depends on ground conditions and expected wind exposure at your location.
